member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter
member.summary: Struct class that store common used parameters.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.Option
member.summary: Gets or sets sampleOptions.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.SampleRateValue
member.summary: Gets or sets SampleRateValue.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.WaferSampleRateValue
member.summary: Gets or sets WaferSampleRateValue.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.WaferSampleList
member.summary: Gets or sets WaferSampleList.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.IsShouldFirstBeSampled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether IsShouldFirstBeSampled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.IsGlobalSampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether IsGlobalSampleRate.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.SampleLowestWaferTrayList
member.summary: Gets or sets SampleLowestWaferTrayList.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.SampleLowestValue
member.summary: Gets or sets SampleLowestvalue.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter.IsSampleLowestTray
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether IsSampleLowestTray.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling
member.summary: DUT Sampling.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.userInputDUTSampleRate
member.summary: SampleRate value for DUT sampling given by the user, This can be uservar or shared key.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.shouldFirstBeSampled
member.summary: Indicates whether this instance should start being sampled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.isGlobalSampleRate
member.summary: Indicate whether to execute global sampleRate.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.sampleRateValue
member.summary: SampleRate Value for DUT sampling.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.currentInstanceSampleCount
member.summary: Indicates how many units went through this particular instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Whether the first DUT is the first sampled.
Whether it is global or local sampleRate.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.SetSampleRateValue
member.summary: Set sample rate values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.InitialiseGlobalSampleRate
member.summary: Check if global sampleRate enable.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.ExecuteLocalDutSampling
member.summary: Execute local dutSampling.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling.Execute
member.summary: DUT Sampling feature to determine whether the unit to be processed or not.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.ISampleRate
member.summary: Sample Rate Interface.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.ISampleRate.Verify
member.summary: Verify.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.ISampleRate.Execute
member.summary: Execute.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling
member.summary: WaferListSampling Rate Interface.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.dutSamplingFeature
member.summary: DutSamplingFeature.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Lowest X value of wafer/tray to be sampled.
True for wafer type, false for tray type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.Verify
member.summary: Verifies the lowest wafer/tray feature input parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.SetLowestSampleRateValue
member.summary: Set lowest sample rate values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.Execute
member.summary: Lowest sampling feature.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.FormWaferTrayList(System.String)
member.summary: Remove all commas, empties, take only unique item and form a list of wafer/tray ID list. Guarantee without empty string, but possible empty list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.ResolveWaferTrayListFormat(System.String)
member.summary: This function checks the format of user input for wafer id and tray id format, and push to list. Acceptable format shall be 121,124,120,122 for wafer, T121, T124, T120, T122 for tray. And combination wafer with tray is 121T120, 124T124, 120T111, 122T119.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.PopulateWaferId(System.String)
member.summary: Only such example item is accepted to be push into list. eg: 123, 120T129 (Before T is wafer, after T is tray).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.LowestTrayWaferSampling.PopulateTrayId(System.String)
member.summary: Only such example item is accepted to be push into list. eg: T123, 120T129 (Before T is wafer, after T is tray).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.Enabled
member.summary: Indicates whether this parameter is enabled or not.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.Enabled.False
member.summary: It's disabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.Enabled.True
member.summary: It's enabled.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.sampleRateFeature
member.summary: Object hold the sampleRateFeature information.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SampleOptions
member.summary: Indicates what wafer sample option to be considered for sampling the wafer.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SampleOptions.WAFER_SAMPLING
member.summary: Sample the wafer based on the wafer sampling parameter.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SampleOptions.WAFER_LIST
member.summary: Sample only the wafer listed by the user or station controller variable.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SampleOptions.DUT_SAMPLING
member.summary: Only DUT sampling is enabled, No wafer Sampling. User should not select this, do wafer Sampling.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SampleOptions.SAMPLE_LOWEST
member.summary: Sample lowest of the X wafer/tray, listed by user, based on lowestSampleValue.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SamplingRateValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the SamplingRateValue, DUT Sampling is based on this number.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.WaferSampleRateValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the WaferSampleRateValue, Wafer Sampling is based on this number.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.WaferSampleList
member.summary: Gets or sets the WaferSampleList, DUT Sampling is based on this wafer list.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SampleOption
member.summary: Gets or sets the SampleOption. This options provide total 4 different mode of operation, it will be decided whether DUT sampling, WAFER sampling, WAFER_LIST or SAMPLE_LOWEST is to be done.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.ShouldFirstBeSampled
member.summary: Gets or sets the ShouldFirstBeSampled. When this parameter is true, first unit will be first sample. Otherwise the first DUT sample to be sample will be the one with same number as SamplingRateValue.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.PrintItuffExitPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrintItuffExitport, DUT Sampling is based on this number.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.GlobalSampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets global sample rate. If true, sampling happen in test-program level, where sampleRate is centralized in uservar. Otherwise it is test-method level or so called local sampleRate.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SampleLowestWaferTrayList
member.summary: Gets or sets the SampleLowestWaferTrayList, list of wafer/tray to be executed for lowest sample.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.SampleLowestValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the SampleLowestValue, lowest numbered wafers/trays to be sampled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.IsSampleLowestTrayType
member.summary: Gets or sets IsSampleLowestTrayType. This parameter will be in use when sampleOption is SAMPLE_LOWEST. If true, tray sampling is taking place. Otherwise, it is wafer sampling.

members.member:
Gets or sets, SkipPort Information, what port the DUT has to exit out , whether to print the ituff information or not.
valid.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.PrimeSampleRateTestMethod.PrintExitPortInfoToItuff(System.Double)
member.summary: Log the port information in the output.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.SampleRateFeatureFactory
member.summary: SampleRateFeatureFactory class to handle instantiation for test method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.SampleRateFeatureFactory.CreateNewSampleRateFeature(Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.CommonParameter,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of sampleRate object, based on input sampleOption.
member.param: Common parameters that share across test method class and factory.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.SampleRateValue
member.summary: Class to resolve input sample rate value from the Shared storage string table or Uservar.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.SampleRateValue.GetSampleRateValue(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: check the user input value reside in uservar or shared storage key, if it is not in either places, it will return the same input value.
member.returns: Value obtained from shared storage key or uservar.
member.param: Input sample rate value by the user, This function shared by the DUT sampling and wafer rate sampling.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.SampleRateValue.GetSampleLowestList(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Check the user input value reside in uservar or shared storage key, if it is not in either places, it will return the same input value. Empty string is allowed.
member.returns: Value obtained from shared storage key or uservar.
member.param: Input SampleLowest item by user, could be a tray id or wafer id, or possibly combination of both.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferListSampling
member.summary: WaferListSampling Rate Interface.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferListSampling.dutSamplingFeature
member.summary: DutSamplingFeature.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferListSampling.#ctor(System.String,Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferListSampling.Verify
member.summary: Verifies theWafer list feature input parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferListSampling.Execute
member.summary: Wafer list feature.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferSampling
member.summary: WaferRateSampling object.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferSampling.dutSamplingFeature
member.summary: DutSamplingFeature.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferSampling.shouldFirstBeSampled
member.summary: Indicates whether this instance should start being sampled.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferSampling.#ctor(System.String,Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.DutSampling,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: specifies the rate which the wafer to be processed.
Whether the first DUT is the first sampled.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferSampling.SetSampleRateValue
member.summary: Set sample rate values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SampleRate.WaferSampling.Execute
member.summary: Wafer Rate feature implementation.
